name: Giants Stumble As The Last 32 Takes Shape
angle: The final group matchday delivered the tournament's biggest shocks yet: Ecuador downed group winners Germany, Turkiye beat the hosts USA with the last kick, and Curacao's record-breaking debut ended as the round of 32 locked into place.

questions.question: Germany lost their final group game 2-1 to which South American side, who still squeezed into the round of 32?
Who scored Ecuador's 78th-minute winner to complete the comeback against Germany?
Germany led inside two minutes through a fierce strike from which winger, before Ecuador hit back?
Despite the defeat to Ecuador, where did Germany finish in Group E?
Hosts USA suffered their first defeat of the tournament, beaten 3-2 by Turkiye. The USA's opener came from a defender's first international goal. Which centre-back scored it?
Turkiye's equaliser against the USA was finished off by which 21-year-old Real Madrid playmaker?
Turkiye snatched a dramatic 3-2 win over the USA with a goal deep in stoppage time. Who scored that last-gasp winner?
The USA still topped Group D despite the loss. Which side, through as one of the best third-placed teams, awaits them in the round of 32?
Switzerland sealed top spot in Group B with a 2-1 win over which co-host nation?
The Netherlands won Group F with a 3-1 win over which winless side, as Japan and Sweden drew 1-1 to also progress?
Curacao bowed out in the group stage, ending the run of the smallest nation ever to reach a World Cup. Whose record had they broken to claim that tag?
Curacao's historic first World Cup was masterminded by which much-travelled Dutch head coach?
Ecuador reaching the knockouts is only the second time they have made it out of the group stage. In which year did they first do it?
The USA are co-hosting in 2026. The last time they staged the World Cup, in 1994, who lifted the trophy on American soil?
Turkiye's victory marked a long-awaited return to the finals. Before 2026, when did they last appear at a World Cup, a tournament in which they finished third?
